business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial construction operations including carpentry, electrical wiring, plumbing, masonry, interior painting, project management/supervision, and clerical office employees.

coverages_discussed.notes: PCRB Large Risk experience rating worksheet for Pennsylvania. Final Experience Modification Factor: 0.86.

positives: Final experience modification factor is 0.86, indicating favorable loss experience relative to expected losses.
Interstate rating is listed as No, indicating Pennsylvania-only rating exposure on this worksheet.
Diverse construction classifications are supported by clerical and project management payroll classes.
concerns: Actual losses are present in each of the three experience years.
Construction operations include higher-hazard classes such as carpentry, masonry, electrical wiring, plumbing, and painting.
Ten claims were reported in policy year 2021-2022.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Three policy years of actual loss data are shown: 2023-2024 with 7 claims and total incurred losses of 190770; 2022-2023 with 3 claims and total incurred losses of 115267; and 2021-2022 with 10 claims and total incurred losses of 240694. Total actual primary losses are 335671 and actual excess losses are 211060.

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: PCRB Experience Rating Worksheet for Keystone Commercial Builders, Inc. under the Pennsylvania Compensation Rating Bureau, Rating Plan: Large Risk, Effective Date: 2026-03-15. Calculated Mod: 0.8600. Final Experience Modification Factor: 0.86.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: PAYROLL / CLASSIFICATION DATA: Carpentry — NOC; Electrical Wiring; Plumbing — NOC; Masonry — NOC; Painting — Interior; Contractors — Project Manager, Superintendent; Clerical Office Employees — NOC.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: ACTUAL LOSS DATA: 2023-2024: 7 claims, total paid 190770, total incurred 190770, primary losses 120455, excess losses 70315. 2022-2023: 3 claims, total paid 115267, total incurred 115267, primary losses 58500, excess losses 56767. 2021-2022: 10 claims, total paid 240694, total incurred 240694, primary losses 156716, excess losses 83978.
